query:
SELECT r.id, r.status, r.totalScore, r.userId, s.name as scenarioName, s.moduleId
FROM runs r
JOIN scenarios s ON r.scenarioId = s.id
WHERE r.userId = 1470015
ORDER BY r.id ASC;
